compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong distributional divergence between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS class dominated by a single port and zero entropy.

Potential for shortcut-like signal due to dominant port in DDoS

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: CWE Flag Count shows extremely low cardinality with unique_values=1 and cardinality_ratio=1e-05.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Low cardinality consistent with other low diversity flag features; may indicate uninformative or saturated measurement.
uncertainty_notes: Unclear if this low diversity is due to feature design or data characteristics

unresolved_tensions.description: Presence of duplicated rows may conflict with observed class-conditioned structural variation and strong feature dependencies, complicating interpretation of feature stability and redundancy.

Class-conditioned variation may be partially explained by duplication patterns
unresolved_tensions.reason_unresolved: Insufficient evidence to disambiguate impact of duplication on structural patterns

unresolved_tensions.description: Features with near-constant values coexist with features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation, creating tension between stable and variable feature subsets.
